org.firstinspires.ftc.teamcode.pedroPathing

Class Drawing

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.firstinspires.ftc.teamcode.pedroPathing.Drawing

  • class Drawing
extends java.lang.Object
    This is the Drawing class. It handles the drawing of stuff on Panels Dashboard, like the robot.
    Version:
    1.1, 5/19/2025
    Author:
    Lazar - 19234

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private static Style historyLook 
      private static FieldManager panelsField 
      static double ROBOT_RADIUS 
      private static Style robotLook

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static void drawDebug(Follower follower)
      This draws everything that will be used in the Follower's telemetryDebug() method.
      static void drawPath(PathChain pathChain, Style style)
      This draws all the Paths in a PathChain with a specified look.
      static void drawPath(Path path, Style style)
      This draws a Path with a specified look.
      static void drawPoseHistory(PoseHistory poseTracker)
      This draws the pose history of the robot.
      static void drawPoseHistory(PoseHistory poseTracker, Style style)
      This draws the pose history of the robot.

      This draws a robot at a specified Pose.
      static void drawRobot(Pose pose, Style style)
      This draws a robot at a specified Pose with a specified look.

      This prepares Panels Field for using Pedro Offsets
      static void sendPacket()

    • Method Detail

      • init

        public static void init()
        This prepares Panels Field for using Pedro Offsets

      • drawDebug

        public static void drawDebug(Follower follower)
        This draws everything that will be used in the Follower's telemetryDebug() method. This takes a Follower as an input, so an instance of the DashbaordDrawingHandler class is not needed.
        Parameters:
        follower - Pedro Follower instance.

      • drawRobot

        public static void drawRobot(Pose pose,
                             Style style)
        This draws a robot at a specified Pose with a specified look. The heading is represented as a line.
        Parameters:
        pose - the Pose to draw the robot at
        style - the parameters used to draw the robot with

      • drawRobot

        public static void drawRobot(Pose pose)
        This draws a robot at a specified Pose. The heading is represented as a line.
        Parameters:
        pose - the Pose to draw the robot at

      • drawPath

        public static void drawPath(Path path,
                            Style style)
        This draws a Path with a specified look.
        Parameters:
        path - the Path to draw
        style - the parameters used to draw the Path with

      • drawPath

        public static void drawPath(PathChain pathChain,
                            Style style)
        This draws all the Paths in a PathChain with a specified look.
        Parameters:
        pathChain - the PathChain to draw
        style - the parameters used to draw the PathChain with

      • drawPoseHistory

        public static void drawPoseHistory(PoseHistory poseTracker,
                                   Style style)
        This draws the pose history of the robot.
        Parameters:
        poseTracker - the PoseHistory to get the pose history from
        style - the parameters used to draw the pose history with

      • drawPoseHistory

        public static void drawPoseHistory(PoseHistory poseTracker)
        This draws the pose history of the robot.
        Parameters:
        poseTracker - the PoseHistory to get the pose history from

      • sendPacket

        public static void sendPacket()
        This tries to send the current packet to FTControl Panels.
